task_description: Find the artist Gareth.T and play the song "用背脊唱情歌" from the artist's page.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed area is the YouTube Music search field at the top left of the page, shown as a black search box with a magnifying-glass icon on the left and an X clear button on the right. The text currently visible in the field is "gareth" with the text cursor at the end, indicating active text entry. A dropdown of search suggestions is open below, including entries such as "gareth t", "gareth. t", "Gareth.T", and songs like "no full frontal" and "No More". In the full screen, this is Google Chrome on the YouTube Music website, with the left navigation sidebar, music recommendations in the main area, and a mini player/control bar along the bottom. The typing appears to be continuing the active search query rather than clicking a result.
caption.think: The user is entering a more specific search term in YouTube Music to find an artist or song related to Gareth T. The intent is to append to the existing query in the active search bar.
caption.action: Type "GARETH T" into the active YouTube Music search field, appending/completing the current search text.
caption.expectation: The search field updates to the typed query and the suggestion list refreshes to more closely match Gareth T-related artists, songs, or albums.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in view shows the YouTube Music search box at the top left with the query "gareth t" entered and a black dropdown of search suggestions beneath it, including entries such as "gareth t", "gareth. t", "Gareth.T", and song results like "no full frontal" and "No More". There is no semitransparent red X, which matches a keyboard action rather than a click. In the full-screen view, Google Chrome is open to YouTube Music, with the left navigation sidebar, album and playlist tiles across the main page, a mini player bar at the bottom, and a small trial popup in the lower left.
caption.think: The user has finished typing the search query and wants to submit it to open the search results page instead of choosing a suggestion manually.
caption.expectation: YouTube Music submits the search for "gareth t" and navigates to a results page showing matching artists, songs, albums, or playlists.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X placed directly on the white artist name text "Gareth.T" inside a large artist card. Beneath the name is smaller gray text indicating this is an artist entry, and below that are rounded buttons including a white shuffle-play button. In the full-screen YouTube Music search results page, the query "gareth t" is in the top search bar, filter chips such as songs, videos, artists, and albums appear below, and the highlighted card is the main artist result in the content area. This is an object on the page content, not a toolbar control or blank area.
caption.think: The user likely wants to open the artist's page from the search results by selecting the main Gareth.T artist card/title.
caption.action: Click the artist name "Gareth.T" on the main search result card.
caption.expectation: The Gareth.T artist page should open, showing the artist profile, songs, albums, and related content.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The view shows the YouTube Music artist page for Gareth.T in dark mode, with no red X because this is a scroll action. Near the top are the artist header details in Chinese, buttons including a white shuffle-play style button, a radio button, a pink-outlined subscribe button, and a three-dot more menu. The main content area currently shows the section titled "热门歌曲" with a list of songs, including rows such as "用背脊唱情歌" and "紧急联络人," with artist name and play counts shown across each row. A vertical scrollbar on the right indicates the page can move further downward. In the full-screen browser context, Chrome is open to YouTube Music, the left sidebar navigation is visible, a trial popup appears in the lower left, and the bottom mini-player is playing "紧急联络人."
caption.think: The user has opened Gareth.T's artist page and wants to continue exploring content below the currently visible top songs list. Scrolling down should reveal more sections farther down the artist page.
caption.action: Scroll down on the main YouTube Music page.
caption.expectation: The artist page moves downward, showing content below the current "热门歌曲" section, such as more songs, albums, singles, playlists, or other artist sections.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the song title row labeled "用背脊唱情歌" in the songs list. It is an object in the page content, not a toolbar or blank area; the row also has a small square thumbnail with a white play triangle on the left. In the full-screen YouTube Music artist page for Gareth.T, the "热门歌曲" section is visible with several song rows, and the clicked target is the top visible song entry in that list.
caption.think: The user is likely selecting this specific song from Gareth.T's popular songs list to start playback or open that track from the artist page.
caption.action: Click the song row titled "用背脊唱情歌".
caption.expectation: The song should become selected and begin playing in the YouTube Music player, with the bottom mini-player updating to this track.
